single.title: Bandwidth used
single.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_user" dst_host="*apple.com" OR dst_host="*itunes.com" OR dst_host="*macupdate.com" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 |eval Total_MB=MB_in+MB_out |stats sum(Total_MB) AS Total_MB | eval TotalMB=round(Total_MB,2)|eval TotalMB = tostring(TotalMB,"commas") + "MB" | table TotalMB

chart.title: Bandwidth usage over time
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_user" dst_host="*apple.com" OR dst_host="*itunes.com" OR dst_host="*macupdate.com" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 |eval Total_MB=MB_in+MB_out |timechart sum(Total_MB) AS Total_MB

table.title: Top Sites
table.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_user" dst_host="*apple.com" OR dst_host="*itunes.com" OR dst_host="*macupdate.com" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 |eval Total_MB=MB_in+MB_out |stats sum(Total_MB) AS Total_MB by dst_host | sort -Total_MB

chart.title: Top 10 users
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="bandwidth_by_user" dst_host="*apple.com" OR dst_host="*itunes.com" OR dst_host="*macupdate.com" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 |eval Total_MB=MB_in+MB_out |stats sum(Total_MB) AS Total_MB by user | sort -Total_MB | head 10
